evidence_summary: Haunted Houses Are you about to renovate your house? You know, knocking down a few walls. Well be prepared. You might find something you weren't banking on—which if disturbed could change your luck. On the other hand, your house may be so spooky you've decided to cut your losses and sell a.s.a.p. Haunted Houses and their expert decoders join Rachael for an adventure into the unknown. Thinking of renovating your house? You might encounter some strange objects when you break through the walls. Don't take fright, they were put there to scare off evil spirits.
